statement: In every magma, Equation 235 (`x = (y * (y * z)) * y`) implies Equation 1405 (`x = y * (((z * w) * y) * x)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0591
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y (op y z)) y)) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op y (op (op (op z w) y) x))
